ClosePeerToPeerConnectionToSynchronizeDn.peerConnId: The peer connection ID for which DNS record synchronization is to be disabled
ClosePeerToPeerConnectionToSynchronizeDn.role: The role in the connection: "initiator" for the initiating side, "acceptor" for the accepting side
ClosePeerToPeerConnectionToSynchronizeDn.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters; see [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
